title: Source & Evidence Review — tracking what supports each claim and what still needs review
distinctive_mechanism: Claims are inspected through a Foundational NSRP-style sourcing protocol, Claim Halo, North Doctrine, source and counter-source, warrant strength, West Dissent, judgment, South Revision, red-team pressure, certification, screen blueprint, data model, and live MuranoOS-oriented test scenarios rather than flattened into citations or comments.

component_demo_cases.project_title: Source & Evidence Review — tracking what supports each claim and what still needs review
component_demo_cases.claim_to_demonstrate: opens the claim as a review object rather than treating it as finished prose; the step records the decision path so the reader can see how the project moves from input to governed output.
component_demo_cases.input_fixture: draft claim, source, counter-source, intended audience
component_demo_cases.operation_under_test: opens the claim as a review object rather than treating it as finished prose; the step records the decision path so the reader can see how the project moves from input to governed output.
component_demo_cases.expected_output: claim record as a reviewable artifact
component_demo_cases.evidence_locator: Expected proof artifact: claim record as a reviewable artifact
runbook: build or run a demonstration that produces the specified output
Use this input fixture: draft claim, source, counter-source, intended audience
Verify that the component produces: claim record as a reviewable artifact
Preserve the evidence at or beside: Expected proof artifact: claim record as a reviewable artifact
acceptance_criteria: The input, operation, and expected output are all visible.
The evidence locator is present or the missing evidence is explicitly named.
The result supports the component claim without implying broader completion.
component_demo_cases.claim_ceiling: The page may claim proof-structured components and visible verification targets. It may not claim external validation, production deployment, or completed empirical findings unless the project-specific record states those facts.
component_demo_cases.next_build_task: Test one representative case; confirm input (draft claim, source, counter-source, intended audience) produces output (claim record as a reviewable artifact) and leaves a visible decision or artifact.
